message:
fix(core): add required MigrationLead approval in cutover_playbook proptest

The advance_succeeds_when_all_blocking_pass test passed gates but missed
the required MigrationLead approval for Preflight stage. Add the approval
record so try_advance() succeeds as intended. 23/23 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
